summary: Croatia's published activity is led by the national CERT (CERT.hr), which ran a webinar on the quantum threat and how organisations can prepare a defence, explicitly covering post-quantum cryptography. No national migration timeline, algorithm guidance or standards camp has been set out in the available material.
